title: Workforce Optimization Study Data for NASA Workforce Directive: Restoring NASA’s Core Competencies

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

The Administrator’s Workforce Directive: Restoring NASA’s Core Competencies (or similar title), issued on or around January–March 2026.

    The "Workforce Optimization Study" or any internal cost-benefit analysis, economic impact report, or financial projection that supports the claim of $1.5 billion in savings associated with the insourcing of contractor roles.

    Final internal memoranda or slide decks presented to the NASA Administrator or the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) between June 2025 and April 2026 regarding the transition of "support contractor" positions to "civil servant" status.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

David Smith
